question: What is the Minimum Order Quantity (MOQ)?
answer: MOQs vary by product category to keep production runs efficient. For silicone caps and small accessories, the standard MOQ is 250–500 units. Larger hardware items, like pool ladders or competition starting blocks, have a lower MOQ starting at 4–10 units. Mixed container loads are available.

question: Do you provide custom branding or OEM service?
answer: Yes. We offer in-factory customization services, including custom Pantone color matching for materials, multi-color screen printing for logo placements, laser-etched serial numbers (for RFID bands/lifevests), and custom branded packaging design.

question: What is your standard shipping lead time?
answer: Standard factory production takes 15–25 business days depending on order size and customization complexity. Air freight delivery takes 5–8 business days, while sea freight to major ports in North America or Europe takes approximately 20–30 calendar days.

question: Are your products compliant with safety standards?
answer: All our commercial life vests are USCG-compliant and CE-approved. Competition-grade lane lines, caps, and starting blocks are FINA compliant. Our factory is audited annually according to ISO 9001:2015 and BSCI ethical guidelines.

question: How can we request a custom quote or request samples?
answer: You can fill out the inquiry form on any product details page, request a quotation via email at supply@aquadura.com, or directly click the WhatsApp integration button for instant customer service routing. Pre-production samples can be shipped for evaluation upon credit approval.
